title: Setting up Automations in a Template Board
excerpt: Is there a way to create a templated board with multiple automations in it but make it so the automations dont run in the board? I have the automations create tasks that are auto assigned to one of our team members and d…

posts.author: crparrett (Christian Parrett)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to create a templated board with multiple automations in it but make it so the automations dont run in the board? I have the automations create tasks that are auto assigned to one of our team members and dont want him to get alerts because the template is running the automation.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @crparrett! You can toggle the automations off on the template. Would that work for you? Cheers!

posts.author: crparrett (Christian Parrett)
posts.cookedHtml: If I toggle it off in the template, won’t it be turned off when i create a board with the template?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @crparrett,

If the automations are off at the time of duplicating or selecting the template the automation will not appear in the new board. What you or your team can do is turn them on before they duplicate or select the template.

Let me know what you think of that.

posts.author: crparrett (Christian Parrett)
posts.cookedHtml: That is an interesting idea. Thank you for the insight @bradley.
